title: Dense Spicy Thai Chicken Larb
description: A citrusy, aerated, and energizing Thai dish from Northern Thailand, featuring seasoned rice vinegar and a tempering process that awakens the senses. This Ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly dish is best enjoyed as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Rice vinegar
ingredients.notes: seasoned with 1 teaspoon grated ginger and 1 teaspoon Thai chili flakes

ingredients.name: Thai chilies
ingredients.notes: chopped, seeded, and chopped again for added heat

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine rice vinegar, palm sugar, fish sauce, lime juice, and 1 tablespoon vegetable oil. Blend until smooth.
Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same wok, add the chopped lemongrass, ginger, and Thai chilies. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked chicken back into the wok and stir in the blended sauce, chopped cilantro, and white pepper.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the chicken is coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
